svg.text: Architecture overview — circular buffer + triggered trace capture
Total: 24 bytes per frame (cache-line friendly, DMA-alignable)
Buffer sizing reference (500 kbit/s CAN bus)
Language implementations: C (MISRA-compatible, atomic_uint), C++ (template CanLogger<N>, std::atomic), Rust (no_std, const N, AtomicUsize + UnsafeCell)
Output formats: ASC (Vector), BLF, MDF4 (ASAM), PCAP-NG (SocketCAN) · Timestamps must be captured in ISR, not in consumer
